fields.name: Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones
fields.description: Premium wireless headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and crystal clear audio. Perfect for music lovers and remote workers.

fields.name: Smart Watch Pro
fields.description: Feature-packed smartwatch with health monitoring, GPS, waterproof design, and 7-day battery. Track your fitness and stay connected.

fields.name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
fields.description: RGB backlit mechanical keyboard with tactile switches, anti-ghosting, and ergonomic wrist rest. Level up your gaming setup.

fields.name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
fields.description: 360-degree surround sound, waterproof IPX7 rating, 12-hour playtime. Take your music anywhere.

fields.name: 4K Webcam
fields.description: Ultra HD 4K webcam with auto-focus, noise-cancelling microphone, and HDR support. Perfect for video calls and streaming.

fields.name: Classic Leather Jacket
fields.description: Genuine leather biker jacket with quilted lining, YKK zippers, and timeless design. Available in black and brown.

fields.name: Premium Running Sneakers
fields.description: Lightweight mesh running shoes with responsive foam cushioning and breathable design. Built for performance and style.

fields.name: Oversized Cotton Hoodie
fields.description: Ultra-soft 100% organic cotton hoodie with relaxed fit. Perfect for everyday casual wear. Multiple colors available.

fields.name: Minimalist Desk Lamp
fields.description: Adjustable LED desk lamp with 5 brightness levels, USB charging port, and touch control. Modern design for any workspace.

fields.name: Scented Candle Set
fields.description: Set of 6 luxury soy wax candles with calming fragrances: lavender, vanilla, sandalwood, jasmine, rose, and ocean breeze.

fields.name: Ceramic Coffee Mug Set
fields.description: Set of 4 handcrafted ceramic mugs with matte finish and comfortable handle. Microwave and dishwasher safe. 350ml capacity.

fields.name: Yoga Mat Premium
fields.description: Extra-thick 6mm non-slip yoga mat with alignment lines, carry strap, and eco-friendly TPE material. Perfect for all yoga styles.

fields.name: Dumbbell Set (5kg Pair)
fields.description: Rubber-coated cast iron dumbbells with hexagonal design to prevent rolling. Suitable for home and gym workouts.

fields.name: Python Crash Course
fields.description: Best-selling programming book for beginners. Learn Python through hands-on projects including games, data visualizations, and web apps.

fields.name: The Psychology of Money
fields.description: A timeless book about wealth, greed, and happiness by Morgan Housel. Understand how people think about money and make better financial decisions.
